joinNote: blockGroups[].geoid (12 chars) — first 11 chars match tracts[].geoid for BG→tract join

blockGroups.label: Population 65 years and over
blockGroups.note: Derived by summing 6 male + 6 female age-bracket cells from B01001

blockGroups.label: Population with any disability
blockGroups.note: Null at BG level — not published in ACS 5-year below tract. Join to tracts[] via geoid[:11].

blockGroups.source: B16004 "well"+"not well"+"not at all" × 4 language groups × 3 age groups (36 cells)
blockGroups.label: Population speaking English less than "very well"

tracts.label: Civilian noninstitutionalized population with any disability
tracts.note: Verified non-null at tract level for all 65 Buncombe County tracts
